name: Luis J. Centeno
title: Sr. Software Engineer
about:
Experienced full-stack web developer with 7+ years of expertise in building dynamic, user-friendly web applications. Skilled in backend frameworks like Django, Ruby on Rails, and Node.js, as well as frontend technologies such as React, Vue, and Angular.
Proficient in CI/CD, testing, Git, and agile methodologies.
Thrives in remote, collaborative environments and is passionate about continuous learning and delivering exceptional user experiences.
short_desc: Passionate full-stack web developer with many years of experience in web development
